Turning Vision into Value
about

Engineer with a data-first mindset

I'm a Computer Science and Engineering graduate from Kalasalingam Academy of Research and Education, specializing in data analytics and backend development, with a strong interest in AI and machine learning.

Across internships and academic projects, I've built REST APIs, full-stack AI platforms, and Power BI dashboards — always with an emphasis on solving real problems rather than shipping features for their own sake. I enjoy the process of breaking a messy problem into a clean, testable system.

I'm equally comfortable digging into a dataset to find the story it's telling and architecting the backend that keeps an application reliable in production. I care about writing code that's easy for the next person to read, and I keep learning — most recently through published IEEE research and hands-on ML systems.

projects

Selected work

Full-stack platforms, healthcare analytics, and applied ML — built end to end.

autohire-ai / README.md

AutoHire AI

AI Job Platform

A full-stack AI career platform that matches candidates to jobs, automates applications, and runs AI voice interviews — all from a single uploaded resume.

  • NLP-based resume parsing with a Python microservice, feeding a semantic job-matching engine.
  • 15+ REST APIs with JWT authentication, documented in Swagger / OpenAPI 3.0.
  • AI voice interview module that generates questions from the candidate's actual resume.

React.jsNode.jsExpress.jsMongoDBPythonJWTDocker
View Code
clegora / README.md

Clegora — AI Legal Rights Assistant

RAG Chatbot

An AI legal assistant that helps Indian citizens understand consumer and civil rights, grounding every answer in real legislative text.

  • RAG pipeline over 2,558 legal-document chunks using LangChain, ChromaDB, and Google Gemini 2.0 Flash, with a Groq fallback.
  • Every answer cites the specific Act, Section, and Sub-section it's grounded in.
  • Full-stack build with FastAPI + React, secured by Firebase Authentication.

RAGPythonFastAPIReact.jsLangChainLlama 3ChromaDBFirebaseAI
View Paper View Code
hospital-ili-dashboard / README.md

Hospital Resource Utilization & ILI Dashboard

Data Analytics

A healthcare analytics dashboard monitoring resource utilization and operational KPIs for proactive hospital decision-making.

  • Designed a custom Invisible Load Index (ILI) to surface hidden operational strain.
  • Interactive Power BI dashboards with trend analysis and forecasting.
  • Data pipeline built with Python and MySQL feeding the reporting layer.

PythonMySQLPower BI
View Code
multi-disease-prediction / README.md

Multiple Disease Prediction System

Machine Learning

A machine learning system predicting diabetes, heart disease, and Parkinson's disease from patient data, built during a Machine Learning internship at HDLC Technologies.

  • Achieved 99% accuracy using Random Forest, SVM, and Logistic Regression models.
  • Findings published as "Leveraging SVM for Accurate Multiple Disease Prediction in Healthcare," IEEE ICIICS 2024.

PythonScikit-learnSVMRandom Forest
View Paper View Code
smart-assistive-stick / README.md

Smart Assistive Stick for the Visually Impaired

IoT · Published

An IoT assistive device for real-time obstacle detection and GPS-based navigation, giving audio and vibration feedback to visually impaired users.

  • Built on Arduino UNO with GPS and Bluetooth modules.
  • Published as "Smart Assistive Stick for the Visually Impaired," IEEE ITIKD 2025 — Scopus & IEEE Xplore indexed.

Arduino UNOGPSBluetoothIoT
View Paper View Code
